      "part_or_section": "",
      "unit_id": "U1",
      "unit_name": "Geometry (Implicit Unit from Context)",
      "marks": null,
      "topics": [
        "Axioms and Postulates",
        "Lines and Angles",
        "Triangles: Congruence Theorems",
        "4-gons (Quadrilaterals)",
        "Circles"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Baudhayana's Sulbasutras, Euclid's definitions, Axioms of measurement, Postulates of Euclidean geometry, Parallelism, Construction of a square",
        "Rays and angles, Measures of angles, Intersecting lines, Pairs of angles, Theorems on intersecting/parallel lines, Linear pair theorem, Vertically opposite angles, Corresponding/alternate/interior angles, Classification of angles (acute, right, obtuse, reflex)",
        "Practical applications of triangles, Proofs of conditions of congruence, SAS, SSS, ASA, RHS, AAS conditions, Isosceles triangle properties, Propositions and their converse",
        "Properties of parallelograms, Midpoint theorem, Central symmetry in 4-gons, Tiling a plane, Coordinates of midpoints/vertices",
        "Definitions (centre, chord, diameter, radius, arc, segment, sector), Circumcircle/circumcentre, Angles subtended by arcs/chords, Cyclic points/quadrilaterals"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Euclidean geometry axioms and postulates",
        "Angle properties and theorems",
        "Triangle congruence conditions (SAS, SSS, ASA, RHS, AAS)",
        "Parallelogram properties and midpoint theorem",
        "Circle properties: chords, arcs, angles subtended, cyclic quadrilaterals"
      ]
    },
    {
      "class_name": "Class 7",
      "subject": "Mathematics",
      "part_or_section": "",
      "unit_id": "U2",
      "unit_name": "UNIT V: MENSURATION",
      "marks": null,
      "topics": [
        "Perimeter and Area Introduction",
        "Area of Shapes (Rectangles, Parallelograms, Triangles)",
        "Heron's Formula",
        "Squaring a Rectangle / Sulbasutras",
        "Area of Circle and Sector"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Perimeter definition, Circumference-to-diameter ratio (Pi), Irrationality of Pi, Length of an arc",
        "Rectangles, Parallelograms, Triangles area computation",
        "Heron's formula derivation and application",
        "Squaring a rectangle proof from Baudhayana's Sulbasutras, Historical approximations to pi (Archimedes, Aryabhata)",
        "Area of circle derivation, Area of sector, Brahmagupta's formula for cyclic 4-gon"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Perimeter and Circumference",
        "Heron's Formula",
        "Squaring the rectangle concept",
        "Brahmagupta's formula as a special case of Heron's formula",
        "Area calculations for circles, sectors, and segments"
      ]
    }
  ],
